task_objective: Review and address follow-up findings from /tmp/refresh_games_optimization_review.md for the refresh_games alias cache commit.
design_decisions: Accepted the lazy lock initialization race finding and guarded __new__ fallback initialization with a module-level lock.
Accepted that the exception fallback was redundant, but rejected the proposed stale-alias fallback after known config changes.
Removed the unreachable fallback branch so failed reloads after a known config change return empty aliases instead of stale aliases.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_adapter_cache.py::test_pyludusavi_adapter_lazy_alias_lock_initialization_is_guarded tests/test_adapter_cache.py::test_pyludusavi_adapter_does_not_return_stale_aliases_after_known_config_change failed before implementation on the missing module-level initialization lock
